title: This site
summary: debasishlenka.in itself — designed and built with heavy AI assistance, as an infra engineer learning to think like a builder.
body: This entire site — the one you're looking at right now — is the first real vibe-coding project on this list.

Built almost entirely through conversation: describing what I wanted, reviewing what came back, and iterating, rather than writing every line by hand. As an infrastructure engineer by trade, this has been a genuinely new way of building something.
More detail on how it came together will land here and on the blog as the project continues.

title: Vibe coding log
summary: A running log of small tools and experiments built by describing what I want rather than writing every line.
body: This entry is a placeholder for an ongoing log — as new experiments happen, they'll get their own entries here, or this one gets updated directly.

Future entries can include a cover image, a demo video, and links to source code or a live version — just fill in the matching fields in content/lab/experiments.json (see README-lab.md for exact instructions).
